scene-01.text: Andani woke up to the sound of birds singing outside her window in Cape Town. Today was the big day — she was flying all the way to Chicago! She jumped out of bed, ready for her adventure. 'What should we pack first?' Daddy asked.

scene-02a.text: Andani grabbed her little blue backpack and carefully tucked her soft elephant toy inside. 'You're coming to America with me!' she whispered. Daddy smiled and zipped up the bag. 'Perfect choice! Now let's head to the airport!'

scene-02b.text: Mommy helped Andani pick out her favorite snacks for the long trip. They packed crackers, apple juice, and bananas into her backpack. 'Yum! Now my tummy won't rumble on the plane,' Andani said with a giggle.

scene-03.text: The airport was huge and busy! They walked up to the friendly lady at the counter who gave Andani her very own boarding pass with a colorful airplane on it. 'Have a safe flight!' she said with a bright smile.

scene-04a.text: Andani pressed her face against the big glass window. 'Wow, look at that giant one!' she shouted. The airplanes looked like big silver birds waiting to fly. Daddy pointed to one and said, 'That's our plane!' It was time to board.

scene-04b.text: Before getting on the plane, they stopped at a little shop. Andani found a cute lion toy holding a South African flag! 'He wants to see Chicago too,' she told Mommy. With her new friend in hand, they headed to the gate.

scene-05a.text: Andani sat by the window and looked out at Table Mountain one last time. As the engines roared, she waved goodbye to Cape Town. The plane lifted up, up, up into the sky! Now that they were flying, it was time for an activity.

scene-05b.text: Andani sat right in the middle, snug between Mommy and Daddy. The flight attendant gave her a special activity book! 'Look, I have so much room to draw,' she said happily. She opened her crayons, ready to create a masterpiece.

scene-06a.text: Andani picked the page with the big T-Rex. She used her green and orange crayons to make him look fierce! Daddy helped color the trees in the background. Suddenly, the plane gave a little bump and shake!

scene-06b.text: Andani found a picture of a baby elephant splashing water. She colored it gray and blue, humming a happy tune. Mommy said, 'That looks just like the elephants back home!' Suddenly, the plane gave a little bump and shake!

scene-07.text: The plane wiggled and wobbled. 'It's just a little turbulence,' Daddy said calmly, holding her hand tight. 'Like driving on a bumpy road!' Andani held onto Daddy's arm until the bumping stopped and the ride was smooth again.

scene-07a.text: Andani put on her headphones and started a funny movie about birds. The screen was bright and colorful, and soon she was giggling so loud that the lady behind them smiled. 'Movies on planes are the best!' she whispered.

scene-07b.text: She looked out the window and saw giant fluffy clouds that looked like castles and dragons. The sun was setting, painting the sky pink and gold. 'It's a magic kingdom up here,' Andani thought, her eyes wide with wonder.

scene-08a.text: The flight attendant brought a hot meal! Andani had pasta and a yummy cookie for dessert. Even her baby brother got a snack. With a full tummy, she started to feel very, very sleepy.

scene-08b.text: It was dark outside now. Andani hugged her teddy bear tight, leaned against the seat, and closed her eyes. Daddy covered her with a warm blanket. She dreamed of flying with the clouds until... 'Wake up, we're here!'

scene-09.text: Andani rubbed her eyes and looked out the window. 'Daddy, look! Giant buildings!' Chicago rose up from the ground like a glittering forest of glass and steel. It was the biggest city she had ever seen!

scene-09a.text: 'That big water looks like the ocean!' Andani said. 'That's Lake Michigan,' Mommy explained. It was huge and blue and bordered the city like a beautiful frame. The plane dipped its wing as it circled around for landing.

scene-09b.text: 'I see a black building with antennas on top!' Andani shouted. 'That's the Willis Tower,' Daddy said. 'We're going to visit that soon!' The city looked so close now she felt she could almost touch it.

scene-10.text: Thump, bump, whoosh! The wheels touched the ground and the plane slowed down. 'We made it!' Andani clapped her hands. They had flown all the way from Africa to America. Now for the last part of the journey.

scene-10a.text: They walked through the busy airport until they saw a familiar face waiting for them. 'Grandma!' Andani dropped her bag and ran as fast as her little legs could go. Grandma scooped her up in a big hug. 'Welcome to Chicago, my little traveler!'
